page_content:
Formerly: BIOE689Z.

BIOE632 Biophotonic Imaging and Microscopy (3 Credits)

Principles and instrumentation of various biomedical optical techniques, including fluorescene and Raman spectroscopy, confocal and multi- photon microscopy, optical coherence tomography, and diffuse optical tomography. Biomedical aplications will also be discussed. Recommended: BIOE420.
